source_summary: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. Available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser.
summary_zh: Claude Code 是一种代理编码工具，可以读取您的代码库、编辑文件、运行命令并与您的开发工具集成。可在您的终端、IDE、桌面应用程序和浏览器中使用。

source_summary: Welcome to Claude Code!
headings: * Step 2: Log in to your account
* Step 5: Make your first code change
* Step 6: Use Git with Claude Code
* Step 7: Fix a bug or add a feature
* Step 8: Test out other common workflows
summary_zh: 欢迎来到 Claude Code！

source_summary: Release notes for Claude Code, including new features, improvements, and bug fixes by version.
summary_zh: Claude Code 的发行说明，包括按版本划分的新功能、改进和错误修复。

source_summary: Understand the agentic loop, built-in tools, and how Claude Code interacts with your project.
headings: * Manage context with skills and subagents
* Stay safe with checkpoints and permissions
* Give Claude something to verify against
summary_zh: 了解代理循环、内置工具以及 Claude Code 如何与您的项目交互。

source_summary: Understand when to use CLAUDE.md, Skills, subagents, hooks, MCP, and plugins.
summary_zh: 了解何时使用 CLAUDE.md、技能、子代理、挂钩、MCP 和插件。

source_summary: Give Claude persistent instructions with CLAUDE.md files, and let Claude accumulate learnings automatically with auto memory.
headings: * Choose where to put CLAUDE.md files
* Share rules across projects with symlinks
* I don't know what auto memory saved
title_zh: Claude 如何记住您的项目
summary_zh: 通过 CLAUDE.md 文件给予 Claude 持久指令，并让 Claude 通过自动记忆自动积累学习内容。

source_summary: Step-by-step guides for exploring codebases, fixing bugs, refactoring, testing, and other everyday tasks with Claude Code.
headings: * Use Plan Mode for safe code analysis
* Run parallel Claude Code sessions with Git worktrees
* Get notified when Claude needs your attention
* Use Claude as a unix-style utility
* Add Claude to your verification process
summary_zh: 使用 Claude Code 探索代码库、修复错误、重构、测试和其他日常任务的分步指南。

source_summary: Tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions.
headings: * Give Claude a way to verify its work
* Explore first, then plan, then code
* Provide specific context in your prompts
summary_zh: 充分利用 Claude Code 的提示和模式，从配置环境到跨并行会话进行扩展。

source_title: Get started with the desktop app
source_summary: Install Claude Code on desktop and start your first coding session
group: Platforms and integrations > Claude Code on desktop
title_zh: 开始使用桌面应用程序
summary_zh: 在桌面上安装 Claude Code 并开始您的第一个编码会话

source_summary: Get more out of Claude Code Desktop: parallel sessions with Git isolation, visual diff review, app previews, PR monitoring, permission modes, connectors, and enterprise configuration.
group: Platforms and integrations > Claude Code on desktop
headings: * Add files and context to prompts
* 403 or authentication errors in the Code tab
* Blank or stuck screen on launch
* MCP servers not working on Windows
* Cowork tab unavailable on Intel Macs
* "Branch doesn't exist yet" when opening in CLI
title_zh: 使用 Claude Code 台式机
summary_zh: 充分利用 Claude Code Desktop：具有 Git 隔离的并行会话、视觉差异审查、应用程序预览、PR 监控、权限模式、连接器和企业配置。

source_summary: Set up automated PR reviews that catch logic errors, security vulnerabilities, and regressions using multi-agent analysis of your full codebase
group: Platforms and integrations > Code review & CI/CD
summary_zh: 设置自动 PR 审查，使用对完整代码库的多代理分析来捕获逻辑错误、安全漏洞和回归

source_summary: Learn about integrating Claude Code into your development workflow with Claude Code GitHub Actions
group: Platforms and integrations > Code review & CI/CD
headings: * Why use Claude Code GitHub Actions?
* Using with AWS Bedrock & Google Vertex AI
* CI not running on Claude's commits
summary_zh: 了解如何使用 Claude Code 将 Claude Code 集成到您的开发工作流程中

source_summary: Learn about integrating Claude Code into your development workflow with GitLab CI/CD
group: Platforms and integrations > Code review & CI/CD
headings: * Why use Claude Code with GitLab?
* Using with AWS Bedrock & Google Vertex AI
* Google Vertex AI job example (Workload Identity Federation)
* Job can't write comments or open MRs
summary_zh: 了解如何使用 GitLab CI/CD 将 Claude Code 集成到您的开发工作流程中

source_title: Continue local sessions from any device with Remote Control
source_summary: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
headings: * Enable Remote Control for all sessions
* Remote Control vs Claude Code on the web
title_zh: 使用 Remote Control 从任何设备继续本地会话
summary_zh: 使用 Remote Control 从您的手机、平板电脑或任何浏览器继续本地 Claude Code 会话。可与 claude.ai/code 和 Claude 移动应用程序配合使用。

source_summary: Run Claude Code tasks asynchronously on secure cloud infrastructure
headings: * What is Claude Code on the web?
* Who can use Claude Code on the web?
* Moving tasks between web and terminal
* Sharing from an Enterprise or Teams account
* Sharing from a Max or Pro account
* Security best practices for customized network access
summary_zh: 在安全的云基础设施上异步运行 Claude Code 任务

source_summary: Connect Claude Code to your Chrome browser to test web apps, debug with console logs, automate form filling, and extract data from web pages.
title_zh: 将 Claude Code 与 Chrome（测试版）结合使用
summary_zh: 将 Claude Code 连接到 Chrome 浏览器以测试 Web 应用程序、使用控制台日志进行调试、自动填写表单以及从网页中提取数据。

source_title: Use Claude Code in VS Code
source_summary: Install and configure the Claude Code extension for VS Code. Get AI coding assistance with inline diffs, @-mentions, plan review, and keyboard shortcuts.
headings: * VS Code extension vs. Claude Code CLI
* Connect to external tools with MCP
* Use git worktrees for parallel tasks
title_zh: 在 VS Code 中使用 Claude Code
summary_zh: 安装并配置 VS Code 的 Claude Code 扩展。通过内联差异、@-提及、计划审查和键盘快捷键获得 AI 编码帮助。

source_summary: Use Claude Code with JetBrains IDEs including IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm, and more
summary_zh: 将 Claude Code 与 JetBrains IDE 结合使用，包括 IntelliJ、PyCharm、WebStorm 等

source_summary: Delegate coding tasks directly from your Slack workspace
headings: * Setting up Claude Code in Slack
* When to use Slack vs. web
summary_zh: 直接从 Slack 工作区委派编码任务

source_summary: Create and use specialized AI subagents in Claude Code for task-specific workflows and improved context management.
headings: * Restrict which subagents can be spawned
* Scope MCP servers to a subagent
* Run subagents in foreground or background
* Choose between subagents and main conversation
summary_zh: 在 Claude Code 中创建和使用专门的 AI 子代理，以实现特定于任务的工作流程并改进上下文管理。

source_title: Orchestrate teams of Claude Code sessions
source_summary: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances working together as a team, with shared tasks, inter-agent messaging, and centralized management.
headings: * Lead shuts down before work is done
title_zh: 编排 Claude Code 会话团队
summary_zh: 通过共享任务、代理间消息传递和集中管理，协调多个 Claude Code 实例作为一个团队协同工作。

source_summary: Create custom plugins to extend Claude Code with skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers.
headings: * When to use plugins vs standalone configuration
* Add LSP servers to your plugin
* Ship default settings with your plugin
* Submit your plugin to the official marketplace
summary_zh: 创建自定义插件以通过技能、代理、挂钩和 MCP 服务器扩展 Claude Code。

source_title: Discover and install prebuilt plugins through marketplaces
source_summary: Find and install plugins from marketplaces to extend Claude Code with new commands, agents, and capabilities.
headings: * What Claude gains from code intelligence plugins
* Try it: add the demo marketplace
title_zh: 通过市场发现并安装预构建的插件
summary_zh: 从市场查找并安装插件，以使用新命令、代理和功能扩展 Claude Code。

source_summary: Create, manage, and share skills to extend Claude's capabilities in Claude Code. Includes custom commands and bundled skills.
headings: * Example: Research skill using Explore agent
* Claude doesn't see all my skills
summary_zh: 创建、管理和共享技能以扩展 Claude 在 Claude Code 中的功能。包括自定义命令和捆绑技能。

source_summary: Use /loop and the cron scheduling tools to run prompts repeatedly, poll for status, or set one-time reminders within a Claude Code session.
summary_zh: 使用 /loop 和 cron 调度工具在 Claude Code 会话中重复运行提示、轮询状态或设置一次性提醒。

source_summary: Adapt Claude Code for uses beyond software engineering
summary_zh: 使 Claude Code 适应软件工程以外的用途

source_summary: Run shell commands automatically when Claude Code edits files, finishes tasks, or needs input. Format code, send notifications, validate commands, and enforce project rules.
headings: * Get notified when Claude needs input
title_zh: 使用钩子自动化工作流程
summary_zh: 当 Claude Code 编辑文件、完成任务或需要输入时自动运行 shell 命令。格式化代码、发送通知、验证命令并执行项目规则。

source_summary: Use the Agent SDK to run Claude Code programmatically from the CLI, Python, or TypeScript.
title_zh: 以编程方式运行 Claude Code
summary_zh: 使用 Agent SDK 通过 CLI、Python 或 TypeScript 以编程方式运行 Claude Code。

source_title: Connect Claude Code to tools via MCP
source_summary: Learn how to connect Claude Code to your tools with the Model Context Protocol.
headings: * What you can do with MCP
* Option 1: Add a remote HTTP server
* Option 2: Add a remote SSE server
* Option 3: Add a local stdio server
* Example: Connect to GitHub for code reviews
* Use a fixed OAuth callback port
* Add MCP servers from JSON configuration
* Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop
* Use Claude Code as an MCP server
* Option 2: Policy-based control with allowlists and denylists
title_zh: 通过 MCP 将 Claude Code 连接到工具
summary_zh: 了解如何使用 Model Context Protocol 将 Claude Code 连接到您的工具。

source_summary: Discover solutions to common issues with Claude Code installation and usage.
headings: * Install script returns HTML instead of a shell script
* Install killed on low-memory Linux servers
* Windows: Claude Desktop overrides `claude` CLI command
* Windows: "Claude Code on Windows requires git-bash"
* Linux: wrong binary variant installed (musl/glibc mismatch)
* Windows installation issues: errors in WSL
* "This organization has been disabled" with an active subscription
* Slow or incomplete search results on WSL
* JetBrains IDE not detected on WSL2
* Escape key not working in JetBrains IDE terminals
* Missing language tags in code blocks
summary_zh: 发现 Claude Code 安装和使用常见问题的解决方案。

source_summary: Learn how Claude Code can integrate with various third-party services and infrastructure to meet enterprise deployment requirements.
headings: * Pin model versions for cloud providers
summary_zh: 了解 Claude Code 如何与各种第三方服务和基础设施集成以满足企业部署要求。

source_summary: Learn about configuring Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock, including setup, IAM configuration, and troubleshooting.
headings: * Map each model version to an inference profile
summary_zh: 了解如何通过 Amazon Bedrock 配置 Claude Code，包括设置、IAM 配置和故障排除。

source_title: Claude Code on Google Vertex AI
source_summary: Learn about configuring Claude Code through Google Vertex AI, including setup, IAM configuration, and troubleshooting.
title_zh: Claude Code 上 Google Vertex AI
summary_zh: 了解如何通过 Google Vertex AI 配置 Claude Code，包括设置、IAM 配置和故障排除。

source_summary: Learn about configuring Claude Code through Microsoft Foundry, including setup, configuration, and troubleshooting.
summary_zh: 了解如何通过 Microsoft Foundry 配置 Claude Code，包括设置、配置和故障排除。

source_summary: Configure Claude Code for enterprise environments with proxy servers, custom Certificate Authorities (CA), and mutual Transport Layer Security (mTLS) authentication.
summary_zh: 使用代理服务器、自定义证书颁发机构 (CA) 和相互传输层安全 (mTLS) 身份验证为企业环境配置 Claude Code。

source_summary: Learn how to configure Claude Code to work with LLM gateway solutions. Covers gateway requirements, authentication configuration, model selection, and provider-specific endpoint setup.
summary_zh: 了解如何配置 Claude Code 以与 LLM 网关解决方案配合使用。涵盖网关要求、身份验证配置、模型选择和特定于提供商的端点设置。

source_summary: Learn about the Claude Code development container for teams that need consistent, secure environments.
summary_zh: 了解适合需要一致、安全环境的团队的 Claude Code 开发容器。

source_summary: System requirements, platform-specific installation, version management, and uninstallation for Claude Code.
summary_zh: Claude Code 的系统要求、特定于平台的安装、版本管理和卸载。

source_summary: Log in to Claude Code and configure authentication for individuals, teams, and organizations.
summary_zh: 登录 Claude Code 并配置个人、团队和组织的身份验证。

source_summary: Learn about Claude Code's security safeguards and best practices for safe usage.
summary_zh: 了解 Claude Code 的安全保障措施和安全使用的最佳实践。

source_summary: Centrally configure Claude Code for your organization through server-delivered settings, without requiring device management infrastructure.
headings: * Choose between server-managed and endpoint-managed settings
title_zh: 配置服务器管理的设置（公开测试版）
summary_zh: 通过服务器提供的设置为您的组织集中配置 Claude Code，无需设备管理基础设施。

headings: * Local Claude Code: Data flow and dependencies
* Cloud execution: Data flow and dependencies
summary_zh: 了解 Anthropic 的 Claude 数据使用政策

source_summary: Learn about Zero Data Retention (ZDR) for Claude Code on Claude for Enterprise, including scope, disabled features, and how to request enablement.
summary_zh: 了解 Claude for Enterprise 上 Claude Code 的零数据保留 (ZDR)，包括范围、禁用的功能以及如何请求启用。

source_summary: Learn how to enable and configure OpenTelemetry for Claude Code.
headings: * Monitor Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary_zh: 了解如何为 Claude Code 启用和配置 OpenTelemetry。

source_summary: Track token usage, set team spend limits, and reduce Claude Code costs with context management, model selection, extended thinking settings, and preprocessing hooks.
headings: * Install code intelligence plugins for typed languages
* Offload processing to hooks and skills
* Move instructions from CLAUDE.md to skills
* Understanding changes in Claude Code behavior
summary_zh: 通过上下文管理、模型选择、扩展思维设置和预处理挂钩，跟踪代币使用情况、设置团队支出限制并降低 Claude Code 成本。

source_summary: View Claude Code usage metrics, track adoption, and measure engineering velocity in the analytics dashboard.
headings: * Access analytics for Teams and Enterprise
title_zh: 通过分析跟踪团队使用情况
summary_zh: 在分析仪表板中查看 Claude Code 使用指标、跟踪采用情况并衡量工程速度。

source_summary: Build and host plugin marketplaces to distribute Claude Code extensions across teams and communities.
headings: * Plugins with relative paths fail in URL-based marketplaces
summary_zh: 构建和托管插件市场以跨团队和社区分发 Claude Code 扩展。

source_summary: Configure Claude Code with global and project-level settings, and environment variables.
headings: * Key points about the configuration system
summary_zh: 使用全局和项目级设置以及环境变量配置 Claude Code。

source_summary: Control what Claude Code can access and do with fine-grained permission rules, modes, and managed policies.
headings: * Match all uses of a tool
summary_zh: 使用细粒度的权限规则、模式和托管策略控制 Claude Code 可以访问和执行的操作。

source_summary: Learn how Claude Code's sandboxed bash tool provides filesystem and network isolation for safer, more autonomous agent execution.
headings: * Granting subprocess write access to specific paths
summary_zh: 了解 Claude Code 的沙盒 bash 工具如何提供文件系统和网络隔离，以实现更安全、更自主的代理执行。

source_summary: Claude Code works best when your terminal is properly configured. Follow these guidelines to optimize your experience.
summary_zh: 当您的终端配置正确时，Claude Code 效果最佳。请遵循这些指南来优化您的体验。

headings: * Control the model users run on
summary_zh: 了解 Claude Code 模型配置，包括 `opusplan` 等模型别名
